rows: Patna High Court PHC Technical Assistant TA Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 53 Post

Patna High Court PHC has released the Technical Assistant TA Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 01/04/2026 to 30/04/2026.candidates should read the PHC TA 2026 Notification / Advertisement for all the information related to the PHC TA exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Selection Procedure, information and other types of information and then apply.
